_note: Fast-food fry-timer beep alarm (the McDonald's kitchen timer, owner req 2026-07-15). REAL recording from myinstants ('McDonalds Beeping Sound' - 1k/1.5kHz timer beeps over kitchen ambience); replaced the same-day synthesized placeholder per owner directive: 'get the actual fryer sound' + channels are NON-MONETIZED (owner policy), so meme rips are fine. The unlisted mcdonalds_beeping_raw.mp3 is the full 15s source kept for re-trimming - NOT in the pick pool (manifest-gated). Wired as a LATER option on the fail + awkward_silence beats in config/sfx_cues.json (never auto-picked while scratch/crickets are stocked - promote it by moving it up that beat's list). The short cut ALSO rotates live in assets/sfx/pop/ (punchline_light lane).
